summary: Surface 'in stock at your store' badge on search results
description: Search results currently show a generic 'in stock' badge that reflects total inventory across the chain, not the user's home store. Customers complain when they buy something that's 'in stock' but unavailable at pickup.

summary: Loyalty tier downgrade email — reduce confusion
description: Customers are surprised by tier downgrades because the email arrives without context. Goal: explain in the email what the customer would need to do to keep their tier.

summary: PCI re-certification — quarterly attestation
description: Annual recurring task. Re-run the PCI evidence collection and attestation for the cardholder data environment. Coordinate with security and external auditor.

summary: Vendor portal: SAML SSO for the top-20 suppliers
description: Strategic suppliers want to use their own identity provider to log into our vendor portal. Implement SAML 2.0 SP-initiated.

summary: Bulk close inactive customer accounts (no activity > 36 months)
description: Privacy program asks us to close customer accounts that have been inactive for 36 months. Need state-by-state opt-out handling and 30-day customer notice.

summary: Migrate the inventory event stream from RabbitMQ to Kafka
description: RabbitMQ doesn't scale to the volume we now see from POS-generated inventory events. Migrate the topic + consumers to Kafka.

summary: Pharmacy refill: SMS reminder when rx is due
description: Send patients an SMS three days before their prescription is due to refill. Opt-in required.

summary: Replace legacy mainframe screen-scraping for inventory queries
description: Some inventory queries still scrape the legacy HOST/3270 mainframe screens. Move to the integration broker pattern per the ARB constraint.

summary: Mobile app: dark mode
description: Customer requests via support are consistent. Add a dark mode option in the mobile app for both iOS and Android.

summary: Two-factor authentication for the vendor portal
description: Compliance flagged that vendor portal users with access to forecast data still log in with password only. Add TOTP-based 2FA.

summary: Audit log retention extended from 18 months to 7 years
description: Pharmacy audit logs need 7-year retention to meet HIPAA. Currently 18 months. Move older logs to cold storage after 90 days.

summary: Returns dashboard for store managers
description: Managers ask for a daily view of returns by reason code at their store. Currently they pull three different reports.

summary: Curbside pickup ETA accuracy
description: Mobile app ETA for curbside pickup is consistently 5-8 minutes optimistic. Recalibrate using actual fulfillment data.

summary: Email-to-claim ingestion for warranty cases
description: Customers email warranty claims to warranty@northstar.com. These currently land in a shared inbox. Parse and create a structured ticket per claim.

summary: Search ranking: factor in customer purchase history
description: Personalize search ranking by what the customer has bought before in the relevant category. A/B test against the unpersonalized baseline.

summary: Payments: Apple Pay and Google Pay at the POS
description: Today the POS supports tap-to-pay via the contactless card surface. Add Apple Pay and Google Pay token acceptance.

summary: OCR for handwritten warranty receipts
description: Some warranty receipts are handwritten or faded. OCR them at upload so the warranty team can search by SKU.

summary: Rate-limit the public price-check API
description: Public price-check endpoint is being scraped by competitors. Add per-IP and per-API-key throttling.

summary: Coverage code mapping for new pharmacy product lines
description: We launched veterinary pharmacy in 12 stores. Insurance coverage codes for animal Rx are different from human. Map and update Rx Hub.

summary: Adjuster note templates for warranty cases
description: Senior warranty agents want reusable note templates. Currently each agent copies from a personal doc.

summary: Migrate batch jobs from cron to Airflow
description: Nightly batch jobs (loyalty tier recalc, regulator reporting) run from a single crontab with no observability. Move to Airflow with retries and SLA alerts.

summary: Post-purchase NPS survey for in-store checkouts
description: Send a 3-question NPS survey by email 24 hours after an in-store purchase. Opt-in only.

summary: Encrypt PII columns at rest in the customer database
description: DOB, SSN, driver's license, and bank account number are stored in plain text in Postgres. Use column-level encryption with KMS-managed keys.

summary: Onboarding checklist automation for new store associates
description: Manual onboarding for new store associates involves 14 steps in 6 systems. Build a single workflow with status tracking.

summary: Real-time fraud scoring on loyalty redemption
description: Loyalty points redemption is being abused — accounts being drained shortly after takeover. Score every redemption on submission against a fraud model.

summary: Version history for receipts/invoices
description: When a returns clerk edits a transaction record, the previous version is overwritten. Keep version history with the original on every edit.

summary: Decommission the legacy regional pricing service
description: Read-only mirror of regional pricing still runs on the old service. Migrate the remaining consumers to the central pricing API and shut down (saves ~$11k/month).

summary: Localize the mobile app to Spanish
description: Many of our markets have large Spanish-speaking populations. Add es-US translations for the mobile app.

summary: Holiday surge: ephemeral capacity for the e-commerce site
description: Black Friday / Cyber Monday traffic causes the e-commerce backend to scale to its limit. Pre-warm capacity ahead of the surge and set Auto-Scaling policies appropriately.

summary: Replace deprecated AWS SDK v1 calls before EOL
description: AWS Java SDK v1 reaches end of life next year. Migrate the remaining ~50 call sites to SDK v2. Touches multiple services.
